Package org.apache.juneau.commons.inject

package org.apache.juneau.commons.inject
Lightweight bean lookup, contribution, and injection support for Juneau.

This package provides a compact, store-centric model intended for framework-owned wiring. It is not a general-purpose CDI/Spring replacement.

Supported annotation interop:
  • JSR-330-style injection markers (matched by FQN, no hard dependency): jakarta.inject.*, javax.inject.*
  • JSR-250 lifecycle markers (matched by FQN, no hard dependency): jakarta.annotation.*, javax.annotation.*
  • Spring @Autowired support (matched by FQN)
Non-goals:
  • Classpath component scanning
  • AOP, transactions, scheduling, caching abstractions
  • General graph solving/autowire containers
  • Related Packages
    Package
    Description
    org.apache.juneau.commons
    Foundational classes and annotations shared across the Juneau Commons libraries.
  • Class
    Description
    BasicBeanStore
    Basic implementation of WritableBeanStore.
    Bean
    Bean injection annotation.
    BeanAnnotation
    Utility classes and methods for the @Bean annotation.
    BeanAnnotation.Array
    A collection of @Bean annotations.
    BeanAnnotation.Builder
    Builder class.
    BeanCreationException
    Unchecked exception thrown when a bean creator method is found but its invocation fails.
    BeanInstantiator<T>
    Utility class for creating beans through constructors, creator methods, and builders.
    BeanInstantiator.Builder<T>
    Builder for BeanInstantiator.
    BeanInstantiator.Scope
    Lifecycle scope for the bean being created.
    BeanStore
    Spring-bean-like interface for looking up beans by type and name.
    BeanStoreOverridable<B extends BeanStoreOverridable<B>>
    Marker interface for builders that accept an overriding BeanStore — a layer whose entries take precedence over the builder's local bean registrations during construction-time reflective injection.
    Condition
    Predicate hook used by Conditional.
    Conditional
    Generic registration guard based on a custom Condition.
    ConditionalOnClass
    Condition that requires a class to be present.
    ConditionalOnClasses
    Container for repeatable ConditionalOnClass.
    ConditionalOnMissingBean
    Condition that requires a bean to be absent in the current store.
    ConditionalOnMissingBeans
    Container for repeatable ConditionalOnMissingBean.
    ConditionalOnProperties
    Container for repeatable ConditionalOnProperty.
    ConditionalOnProperty
    Condition that checks a setting value.
    Conditionals
    Container annotation for repeatable Conditional.
    ConditionContext
    Runtime context for evaluating Condition instances.
    Configuration
    Marks a type that contributes one or more Bean declarations.
    Inject
    Marks constructors, methods, fields, or parameters as injection points.
    JsrSupport
    FQN-based support for JSR-style annotation detection.
    Named
    Identifies a bean-injection qualifier for constructor/method parameters and fields.
    Order
    Ordering hint for beans where lower values have higher precedence.
    PostConstruct
    Marks a no-arg lifecycle callback invoked after dependency injection.
    PreDestroy
    Marks a no-arg lifecycle callback invoked during store shutdown.
    Primary
    Marks a bean contribution as preferred when multiple candidates exist.
    Provider<T>
    Lightweight provider interface equivalent to JSR-330 provider contracts.
    Qualifier
    Meta-annotation used to declare qualifier annotations.
    Singleton
    Scope marker indicating one instance per BeanStore.
    Snapshot
    Opaque handle for a single pushed overlay frame on a WritableBeanStore.
    StackOverlay
    Stack-aware BeanStore overlay.
    Value
    Resolves a configuration value into a constructor parameter, setter, or field.
    ValueResolver
    Internal helper used by the reflection layer to resolve @Value-annotated injection sites.
    WritableBeanStore
    Extends BeanStore with methods for adding beans.
